title: Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide

|release date=[[November]] [[2001]]<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' was a supplement to ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'', which was published on [[November 18]], [[2001]] per ''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]'', and was advertised as being available in the pages of {{BookCite|title=[[Nintendo Power]]|number=issue 150|publisher=[[Nintendo|Nintendo of America]]|date=[[November]] [[2001]]|link=https://archive.org/details/NintendoPower1988-2004/Nintendo%20Power%20Issue%20150%20%28November%202001%29}}.</ref>
|type=Paperback
|pages=112<ref name="Guide" />
|dimensions=
|weight=
|isbn=19320206151
|series=
|preceded by=''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]''
|followed by=''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]''
}}
'''''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide''''',<ref name="Guide" /> also called '''''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader Player's Guide''''',<ref name="Copyright">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' copyright section</ref> was a strategy guide for the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'' from [[LucasArts]] published by [[Nintendo|Nintendo of America]] for the ''[[Nintendo Power]]'' magazine<ref name="Guide" /> in around [[November]] 2001.<ref name="Date" /> It was written by [[Drew Williams]] and [[Alan Averill]] and [[Jennifer Villarreal]].<ref name="Guide" />

{{Book-stub}}
